synopsis: The Standing Judicial Commission found that the Judicial Commission of Korean Capital Presbytery did not follow proper procedures under BCO 32 and 34 in adjudicating charges against appellant TE Sang Soo Ryoo. Specifically, no indictment was ever properly served on the accused, and there was no clear record of proceedings. The case was remanded to Presbytery for a new trial with full compliance to BCO 32 and 34 procedures.
